stories.title: Maxey's 31-Point Masterclass Lifts Sixers Past Magic, 109-97 (FOLLOW-UP)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
MAXEY DELIVERS.

31 PTS. Seven straight in the 4th to seal it.

No Embiid. No problem.

76ers 109, Magic 97 — Philly is PLAYOFF BOUND. Celtics are next. #HoopHeroes #Sixers #NBAPlayoffs

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Rookie VJ Edgecombe wasn't just good Wednesday night — he was FEARLESS.

19 PTS. 11 REB. Talked trash to Jalen Suggs and earned a tech.

Philly's future showed up in the biggest game of the season. #HoopHeroes #Sixers

article.headline: Maxey's 31-Point Masterclass Lifts Sixers Past Magic, 109-97

stories.title: Curry Erupts for 35, Warriors Stun Clippers in Epic Comeback (FOLLOW-UP)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
STEPHEN CURRY. DOWN 13 IN THE 4TH.

35 PTS. 27 in the second half. 7 threes.

Warriors erased a 13-point deficit and ENDED the Clippers' season.

That man is not normal. #HoopHeroes #Warriors #NBAPlayIn

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Kawhi Leonard had 21 points Wednesday.

Then went SILENT in the fourth quarter.

Curry's dagger three at 50.4 seconds. Kawhi watching.

The Clippers' season is over. #HoopHeroes #Warriors

article.headline: Curry Erupts for 35, Warriors Stun Clippers in Epic Second-Half Comeback

stories.title: Play-In Night 3 Tonight — Magic vs. Hornets and Warriors vs. Suns (NEW STORY)

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
TONIGHT. Two games. Two playoff seeds on the line.

Magic vs. Hornets — 7:30 PM ET
Warriors vs. Suns — 10:00 PM ET

One loss and your season is OVER.

Who survives Play-In Night 3? #HoopHeroes #NBAPlayIn #NBA

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
LaMelo Ball had a go-ahead layup with 4.7 seconds left in OT earlier this week.

Tonight Charlotte plays Orlando for the No. 8 East seed.

The Hornets are ending a 10-YEAR playoff drought. 7:30 ET. #HoopHeroes #Hornets

stories.title: The Embiid Question — Will Philly's Star Return For the Playoffs? (FOLLOW-UP)

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The 76ers beat Orlando WITHOUT Joel Embiid.

But Coach Nurse says Embiid hasn't been near the team "AT ALL" since surgery.

No timeline set. Celtics series starts April 19.

The clock is ticking for Philly. #HoopHeroes #Sixers

Eight first-round matchups. Pure drama:

Lakers vs. Rockets (LeBron's records)

Who are you taking? #HoopHeroes #NBAPlayoffs
